design.example: To be hateful of the truth by design.

fashion.example: Check out the latest in fashion.

view.definition: A picture, drawn or painted; a sketch.
view.definitionZh: 一幅画，画的或画的；一幅草图。
view.example: a fine view of Lake George

speaker.definition: One who makes a speech to an audience.
speaker.example: The company hired a motivational speaker to boost morale.

seat.definition: To put an object into a place where it will rest; to fix; to set firm.
seat.definitionZh: 将物体放入休息的地方；固定；固定。
seat.example: Be sure to seat the gasket properly before attaching the cover.

unable.definition: Not able; lacking a certain ability.
unable.example: Are you unable to mind your own business or something?

blocked.definition: To fill (something) so that it is not possible to pass.
blocked.definitionZh: 填充（某物） ，使其无法通过。

market.definition: A gathering of people for the purchase and sale of merchandise at a set time, often periodic.
market.definitionZh: 在一定时间（通常是定期）购买和销售商品的人们聚集在一起。
market.example: The privilege to hold a weekly market was invaluable for any feudal era burgh.

areas.definition: Any particular extent of surface, especially an empty or unused extent.
areas.definitionZh: 任何特定的表面范围，特别是空的或未使用的范围。
areas.example: The photo is a little dark in that area.

realised.definition: To make real; to convert from the imaginary or fictitious into reality; to bring into real existence
realised.definitionZh: 使真实；从想象或虚构转化为现实；使真实存在
realised.example: The objectives of the project were never fully realized.

variety.definition: The quality of being varied; diversity.
variety.example: Variety is the spice of life.

message.definition: A communication, or what is communicated; any concept or information conveyed.
message.definitionZh: 沟通，或沟通的内容；传达的任何概念或信息。
message.example: We've just received an urgent message from the President.

exciting.example: The fireworks which opened the festivities excited anyone present.

critical.definition: Inclined to find fault or criticize
critical.definitionZh: 倾向于发现错误或批评
critical.example: A good teacher is fair but critical.

industry.definition: The tendency to work persistently. Diligence.
industry.example: Over the years, their industry and business sense made them wealthy.

unfair.example: It was unfair for the boss to give larger bonuses to his friends.

advice.definition: An opinion offered in an effort to be helpful.
advice.definitionZh: 为了提供帮助而提出的意见。
advice.example: She was offered various piece of advice on what to do with her new-found wealth.

criticise.example: They criticized him for endangering people's lives.

careers.definition: General course of action or conduct in life, or in a particular part of it.
careers.definitionZh: 生活中的一般行动或行为，或其特定部分。

discussing.definition: To converse or debate concerning a particular topic.
discussing.definitionZh: 就特定话题进行交谈或辩论。
discussing.example: I don't wish to discuss this further. Let's talk about something else.

future.definition: Goodness in what is yet to come. Something to look forward to.
future.definitionZh: 善良在即将到来的事情上。值得期待的东西。
future.example: There is no future in dwelling on the past.

disagree.definition: To fail to agree; to have a different opinion or belief.
disagree.definitionZh: 不同意；有不同的意见或信仰。
disagree.example: Bob says cats are friendlier than dogs, but I disagree.

assistant.definition: Having a subordinate or auxiliary position.

career.definition: General course of action or conduct in life, or in a particular part of it.
career.definitionZh: 生活中的一般行动或行为，或其特定部分。

realistic.definition: Expressed or represented as being accurate, practicable, or not idealistic.
realistic.definitionZh: 表达或表示为准确、切实可行或不理想主义。
realistic.example: A realistic appraisal of the situation.

practice.definition: Repetition of an activity to improve a skill.
practice.definitionZh: 重复一项活动以提高技能。
practice.example: He will need lots of practice with the lines before he performs them.

admit.definition: To allow to enter; to grant entrance (to), whether into a place, into the mind, or into consideration
admit.definitionZh: 允许进入；允许进入（进入） ，无论是进入一个地方，进入心灵，还是考虑
admit.example: A ticket admits one into a playhouse.

mistakes.definition: To understand wrongly, taking one thing or person for another.
mistakes.definitionZh: 为了理解错误，将一件事或一个人换成另一件事或另一个人。
mistakes.example: Don't mistake my kindness for weakness.

employer.definition: A person, firm or other entity which pays for or hires the services of another person.
employer.definitionZh: 支付或雇用他人服务的个人、公司或其他实体。

earn.definition: To gain (success, reward, recognition) through applied effort or work.
earn.definitionZh: 通过付出努力或工作获得（成功、奖励、认可）。
earn.example: You can have the s'mores: you earned them, clearing the walkway of snow so well.

lot.definition: A large quantity or number; a great deal.
lot.definitionZh: 数量或数量很大；非常多。

attention.example: Please direct your attention to the following words.

openly.definition: In an open manner, visibly, not covertly.
openly.definitionZh: 以开放的方式，明显地，而不是秘密地。

disliking.definition: To leave a vote to show disapproval of, or lack of support for, something posted on the Internet.
disliking.definitionZh: 投票表示不赞成或不支持在互联网上发布的内容。
disliking.example: Rebecca Black's "Friday" video has gained notoriety for being one of the most disliked videos in YouTube history.

client.definition: A customer, a buyer or receiver of goods or services.
client.definitionZh: 货物或服务的客户、买方或接收方。

useful.definition: Having a practical or beneficial use.
useful.definitionZh: 具有实际或有益的用途。

retail.definition: The sale of goods directly to the consumer, encompassing the storefronts, mail-order, websites, etc., and the corporate mechanisms, branding, advertising, etc. that support them.
retail.definitionZh: 直接向消费者销售商品，包括店面、邮购、网站等，以及支持它们的公司机制、品牌、广告等。

pieces.definition: A part of a larger whole, usually in such a form that it is able to be separated from other parts.
pieces.definitionZh: 较大整体的一部分，通常以能够与其他部分分开的形式存在。
pieces.example: I’d like another piece of pie.

designs.example: To be hateful of the truth by design.

return.example: I expect the house to be spotless upon my return.

items.example: Tweezers are great for manipulating small items.

sizes.definition: The dimensions or magnitude of a thing; how big something is.
sizes.definitionZh: 事物的尺寸或大小；事物的大小。
sizes.example: The size of the building seemed to have increased since I was last there.
